summary: Role 6 round 2 source truth/provenance consensus review completed. Revised plan contains an explicit P0-06 source/chunk/claim lineage hard gate with anchor-only exclusion, Context Pack item classification, graph/health failure cases, RAG source coverage reporting, source-lineage verifier, and verify:goal linkage.
